Research Experience.description: Conducting research on synthesis of tool code for LLM agents

Projects.name: Compass AI
Projects.summary: Generative AI Agent for Automated Video Editing

desc.text: Created an AI system to automatically edit short videos.

points.p_text: Attempted to use a Large Language Model (LLM) to select relevant editing effects from a predefined set; however, this approach proved unviable as it required effects to be limited to the set.
Explored generating custom editing effects directly with the LLM using example-based prompts, but the output did not achieve a human-like quality in editing.

Projects.name: Peer-to-Peer (P2P) Lending System
Projects.summary: A platform for direct borrowing and lending between individuals without relying on traditional banks.

desc.text: Nepal lacks P2P lending platforms such as LendenClub in India and LendingClub in the US, which prompted us to create a tailored model during our undergraduate studies
Invited by the Economic Research Department of Nepal Rastra Bank, the Central Bank of Nepal, to present our approach to their officials.

Work Experience.name: Zakipoint Health
Work Experience.summary: US based Healthcare company working in Big Data and AI analytics
highlights: Deployed Mistral 7B on company's cloud infrastructure to enable HIPAA-compliant use of large language models (LLMs)
Implemented LLM based document automation tool which reduced information extraction time from 45 minutes to 6 minutes with Human-in-the-Loop approach
Developed end-to-end automation for processing Machine Readable Files using PySpark and Elasticsearch, doubling workload capacity by enabling 24/7 server use

Work Experience.name: CodeHimalaya
Work Experience.summary: Nepal based Fintech company working in Mobile Banking
highlights: Built a scalable API middleware for Core Banking Systems vendors using a multi-tenant architecture, enabling efficient data management for multiple clients
Implemented a secure centralized microservice for user authentication and access management, designed to authenticate requests for all downstream services.
Enhanced data security in a neo-banking project by developing a microservice, which tokenizes Personally Identifiable Information (PII) data before sending it to the data lake.

Education.studyType: Bachelor of Engineering in Software Engineering
courses: Mentored junior members and led programming sessions as an active member of the Nepal Open Source Klub (NOSK)
